extraction.one_line_summary: MASNADA Fausto attacked 10km from summit with CONTI Valerio, cooperated through final kilometers, then won sprint for stage while Conti took pink jersey.
tactical_patterns: MASNADA-CONTI formed dual-objective alliance: one rider stages, other takes pink, neutralizing chase cooperation from 13-rider breakaway remnants.
UAE BAHRAIN let 13-rider break gain 6.5min early despite pink jersey defense, intentionally surrendering maglia rosa before time trial.
Breakaway fracture occurred 10km from summit when tired riders refused to share chase work, allowing two-man move to stay clear.

rider_signals.MASNADA Fausto: positive: initiated winning 10km move on climb, showing diesel engine capacity to sustain long-range acceleration into sprint finish
rider_signals.CONTI Valerio: positive: strategically prioritized GC over stage win in two-up finish, calculated 5min+ time gain worth more than glory
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: negative: crashed early losing skin/shorts, then surrendered pink jersey without defending, signaling team prioritization shift pre-ITT
rider_signals.NANS Peters: neutral: finished third GC at 1:47 despite not making final selection, revealing breakaway depth exceeded chase organization
